_comment: Metriques par cycle -- remplace METRICS.md. Ecrit par merlin-qa-lead apres chaque cycle.
qa_checks_c165: CHECK 4a: GroqAdapter.generateMerlinWhisper — AbortController 4s timeout, max_tokens:40, error-safe .catch()
CHECK 4b: OghamPanel touchend — preventDefault() + cleanup via slotSignal AbortController
CHECK 4c: Skull zone — pointer-events:none, proper fade-out cleanup, med.remove()
CHECK 4d: Cauldron Groq call — .catch(() => null) fallback to MERLIN_QUOTES, crystal label 'Sphère de Cristal'
CHECK 5a: HUD.setHUDWalkMode() — exported, opacity transition 0.4s, no RAF leaks
CHECK 5b: main.ts calls — setHUDWalkMode(true) before rail.resume(), setHUDWalkMode(false) before card overlay
CHECK 6: index.html menu buttons — font-family: Courier New,monospace ✓, CRT green colors ✓, texts '> NOUVELLE PARTIE' / '> CONTINUER' ✓
CHECK 8: CRT charter audit — 0 Georgia/serif/#cd853f/Segoe/system-ui violations
CHECK 9: Race conditions — doorTriggered flag blocks concurrent overlays on skull zone, no double-meditation risk
commits_verified: fix(cycle-164): journal stats cross-run + merlin quotes celte + intro dialogue polish
fix(cycle-163): HUD walk compact bar + MainMenu CRT button polish
fix(cycle-162): cauldron Groq whispers + skull meditation + ogham touchend + lore fix
qa_cycles_verified: C162 (GroqAdapter cauldron + skull meditation + OghamPanel touchend), C163 (HUD walk mode + menu buttons), C164 (journal + MerlinIntro)
notes: POST-C164 REGRESSION QA. (1) GroqAdapter.ts (C162): generateMerlinWhisper(biome) async→Promise<string|null>, AbortController 4s timeout, fetch error→null, 40 token cap, fallback to MERLIN_QUOTES. (2) OghamPanel.ts (C162): All slot+skipBtn touchend listeners with preventDefault() + signal: slotSignal cleanup. (3) main.ts skull zone (C162): med overlay 3s meditation with pointer-events:none, no race condition (doorTriggered guard blocks concurrent triggers), cleanup via med.remove() post fade. (4) main.ts cauldron zone (C162): llm.generateMerlinWhisper().catch(()=>null), fallback to quote pool, zone label updates correctly. (5) HUD.ts (C163): setHUDWalkMode(walk:boolean) exported, modifies opacity 0→1 or 1→0.2 via CSS transition, no RAF/setInterval. (6) main.ts (C163): HUD calls before/after walk phase correct. (7) index.html (C163): Menu buttons have Courier New,monospace, CRT colors, correct texts. (8) MerlinIntro.ts (C164): 4-line druidic register, typewriter 40ms/char, skip via click/Space/Enter, proper cleanup (listener removal + overlay.remove()), vocabulary celtique OK. (9) Journal.ts (C164): reads store.getState().meta for cross-run stats, closeBtn handlers removed in dismiss(), overlay.remove() cleanup. (10) CRT Charter: CLEAN. Memory audit: touchend listeners removed via AbortController, med/overlay DOM properly disposed. Status: REGRESSION QA PASS — ALL CHECKS GREEN.

regression_audit.groq_socket_leak: SAFE - AbortController 4s timeout + fetch error handling (.catch() complete)
regression_audit.hud_opacity_leak: CLEAN - CSS transition, no RAF or setInterval, opacity state managed
regression_audit.dom_cleanup_skull_med: VERIFIED - med.remove() after fade, pointer-events:none prevents clicks during fade
regression_audit.touchend_listener_leak: SAFE - All touchend listeners removed via slotSignal AbortController
regression_audit.race_condition_skull: SAFE - doorTriggered flag prevents concurrent meditation overlays
regression_audit.journal_listener_leak: CLEAN - closeBtn handlers removeEventListener in dismiss(), keydown handler also removed
regression_audit.crt_charter: CLEAN - 0 violations across all UI layers

conclusion: C165 QA PASS. No blockers, no warnings. Ready to merge. Build stable (3.12s), bundle stable (749KB), all regression checks green. C162/C163/C164 features verified end-to-end.
